Set Up Daily L...
Add Distribution List Members
Select the users to receive distributed daily logs.

Adding users to the Daily Log distribution list helps them stay up to date when daily logs are completed and distributed.

Configure Log Types
Select which logs are available in the project's Daily Log.

Configure your project's Daily Log to fit your needs by defining which log types are displayed, and then select the log types that external collaborators can create pending entries for.
